title: celmisia latifolia
intro: Celmisia latifolia, also known as broad-leaved mountain daisy, is a flowering plant in the daisy family that is native to New Zealand and Australia. The medicinal properties of Celmisia latifolia include its ability to reduce inflammation and act as a diuretic, making it useful in treating urinary issues and skin conditions. The health benefits of consuming Celmisia latifolia are attributed to its antioxidant and anti-inflammatory properties, which can help to protect against cell damage and improve overall well-being. Celmisia latifolia can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or tinctures, and is also used in traditional medicine as a topical application for skin issues and wounds.
